items.title: [正面] An amazing StS-like game that was held back by a s...
items.summary:
An amazing StS-like game that was held back by a shoddy ChatGPT translation, but now has its entire first Arc properly human translated, alongside a good number of its side stories. A group of volunteers are actively working on getting more of it properly localized.

Absolutely gorgeous presentation, compelling story, incredibly unique character designs, and gameplay that is equal parts complex and rewarding. I recommend joining the official Discord server if you decide to give it a try and have any questions, as it's a very welcoming community.

items.title: [正面] [b]Overall[/b] I recommend this game without reser...
items.summary:
[b]Overall[/b] I recommend this game without reservation. [b]Five Stars[/b].

Morimens (from the Latin, [i]mori[/i] "to die" and [i]mens[/i] "mind", e.g. "dying mind") is a game set in a Lovecraftian and Victorian London.  For reasons that aren't yet clear, people, knowledge, and memories are fading away and disappearing.  You'll pilot the main character as he or she navigates this world with a [i]very[/i] colorful group of friends.

The [b]storyline plot[/b] is a strong selling point, as it's a thoughtful and original story that manages to be unusually charming.  Let's get this out of the way though.  The game was developed and written by a very small indie game studio in China, and due to financial constraints, all language translations were done initially with ChatGPT.  This bothers some people [i]a lot[/i].  If it bothers you, I'd ask you to try the game anyway.  It's very readable, and it's being improved constantly. Work is underway to translate the game into English with human translators.  Just be patient, they're working on it!

If you love Slay the Spire, the [b]gameplay[/b] here will feel familiar.  In my opinion, Morimens improves on the Slay the Spire formula.  When you enter an area, you'll explore your way through a compact map filled with various different encounter types, fighting against enemies and powering up your squad before challenging each map's final boss.  Combat plays out using cards, and throughout the map you'll have opportunities to tweak your card deck and power up your team members.

Speaking of the characters, the [b]designs[/b] are variously inspired by Lovecraftian themes and vampire lore.  The visual designs and character kits are unique and stunning, without ever debasing themselves with fan service slop.  You won't have to hide your device if you play near others!

Something that deserves recognition is that the developers spent a huge amount of their budget on the [b]music[/b], and it shows.  The music is very high quality, and the sound quality is absolutely exceptional.  Play with the sound on, it's fantastic.

Mysteriously, the developer hasn't done much marketing for this game outside of China, so not many people even know it exists.  And that's a real shame, because it is an absolutely remarkable game that really deserves so much love.  I haven't truly enjoyed myself gaming like I have with Morimens in a very long time.

[b]Overall[/b], deeply strategic and rewarding gameplay, challenging content, charming characters, an engaging storyline, and beautiful music make this game an easy recommendation.  Give it a try.  It may feel overwhelming at first, but if you stick with it for a while, it all comes together beautifully.

items.title: [正面] Game is a hidden gem in the rogue lite deck buildi...
items.summary: Game is a hidden gem in the rogue lite deck building genre. It is a gacha, so beware of those things, though it is extremely generous if youve played the popular ones like genshin impact or wuthering waves. Definitely worth a try because of its gameplay and cthulhu mythos style world
